sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48965" key="qoro/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θορό-εις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n48965.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in embryo</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βρέφος θ</foreign>. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:522" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.522</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
